option.name: filePath
option.value: /HoldingsService (snapshot).cs

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: { "Jwt:Key": "ETFTracker-SuperSecret-JWT-Key-2026-32chars-long", "OAuth:GitHub:ClientId": "GITHUB_CLIENT_ID", "OAuth:GitHub:ClientSecret": "GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET", "OAuth:Google:ClientId": "GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID", "OAuth:Google:ClientSecret": "GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET" }

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web">
<PropertyGroup> <TargetFramework>net10.0</TargetFramework> <Nullable>enable</Nullable> <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings> </PropertyGroup>
<ItemGroup> <PackageReference Include="AspNet.Security.OAuth.GitHub" Version="10.0.0" /> <PackageReference Include="HttpClientFactory" Version="1.0.5" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.Google" Version="10.0.5" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer" Version="10.0.5" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi" Version="10.0.5" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Tools" Version="10.0.5"> <IncludeAssets>runtime; build; native; contentfiles; analyzers; buildtransitive</IncludeAssets> <PrivateAssets>all</PrivateAssets> </PackageReference> <PackageReference Include="Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL" Version="10.0.1" /> <PackageReference Include="Polly" Version="8.6.6" /> <PackageReference Include="System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt" Version="8.17.0" /> </ItemGroup>
</Project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web">
<PropertyGroup> <TargetFramework>net10.0</TargetFramework> <Nullable>enable</Nullable> <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings> <UserSecretsId>etftracker-api-secrets</UserSecretsId> </PropertyGroup>
<ItemGroup> <PackageReference Include="AspNet.Security.OAuth.GitHub" Version="10.0.0" /> <PackageReference Include="HttpClientFactory" Version="1.0.5" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.Google" Version="10.0.5" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer" Version="10.0.5" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi" Version="10.0.5" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Tools" Version="10.0.5"> <IncludeAssets>runtime; build; native; contentfiles; analyzers; buildtransitive</IncludeAssets> <PrivateAssets>all</PrivateAssets> </PackageReference> <PackageReference Include="Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL" Version="10.0.1" /> <PackageReference Include="Polly" Version="8.6.6" /> <PackageReference Include="System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt" Version="8.17.0" /> </ItemGroup>
</Project>

updatedContent

updatedContent

originalContent
option.value:
import { Routes } from '@angular/router';
export const routes: Routes = [];

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
Loading dashboard...

{{ error }}

ETF Portfolio Dashboard

Total Holdings
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.totalHoldingsAmount) }}
Total Variation
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.totalVariation.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.totalVariation.gainLossPercent) }}
Daily Change !
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.dailyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.dailyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
No prices available for today (market closed)
Weekly Change !
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.weeklyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.weeklyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
Prices unavailable for comparison
Monthly Change !
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.monthlyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.monthlyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
Prices unavailable for comparison
YTD Change !
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.ytdMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.ytdMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
Prices unavailable for comparison

Yearly Projections

Calculating projection…

Calculating projection…

Year Initial Balance Total Buys Year Profit EoY Balance EoY Inflation-Corrected Tax Due After Tax Balance After Tax Balance Inflation-Corrected
{{ point.year }} {{ formatCurrency(point.initialBalance) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.totalBuys) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.yearProfit) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.totalAmount) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.inflationCorrectedAmount) }} {{ (point.taxPaid + point.exitTaxPaid) > 0 ? formatCurrency(point.taxPaid + point.exitTaxPaid) : '—' }} ET {{ formatCurrency(point.afterTaxTotalAmount) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.afterTaxInflationCorrectedAmount) }}

Portfolio Allocation

{{ slice.ticker }} {{ slice.etfName }}
{{ formatCurrency(slice.value) }} {{ slice.percent.toFixed(1) }}%

Your Holdings

Ticker ETF Name Quantity Avg Cost Current Price Price Source Total Value Gain/Loss Actions
Daily Weekly Monthly YTD
{{ holding.ticker }} {{ holding.etfName }} {{ formatQuantity(holding.quantity) }} {{ formatCurrency(holding.averageCost) }} {{ formatCurrency(holding.currentPrice) }} {{ getPriceSourceLabel(holding.priceSource) }} {{ formatCurrency(holding.totalValue) }}
{{ formatCurrency(holding.dailyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(holding.dailyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
{{ formatCurrency(holding.weeklyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(holding.weeklyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
{{ formatCurrency(holding.monthlyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(holding.monthlyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
{{ formatCurrency(holding.ytdMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(holding.ytdMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}

Loading portfolio evolution…

Buy recorded on this day Portfolio value

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
ETF Tracker
{{ (user.name || user.email || '?')[0].toUpperCase() }}
{{ user.name || user.githubUsername || user.email }}

Loading dashboard...

{{ error }}

ETF Portfolio Dashboard

Total Holdings
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.totalHoldingsAmount) }}
Total Variation
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.totalVariation.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.totalVariation.gainLossPercent) }}
Daily Change !
{{ formatCurrency(dashboard.header.dailyMetrics.gainLossEur) }}
{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.dailyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
No prices available for today (market closed)
Weekly Change !

{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.weeklyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}
Prices unavailable for comparison

{{ formatPercent(dashboard.header.monthlyMetrics.gainLossPercent) }}

YTD Change !

Year Initial Balance Total Buys Year Profit EoY Balance EoY Inflation-Corrected Tax Due After Tax Balance After Tax Balance Inflation-Corrected
{{ point.year }} {{ formatCurrency(point.initialBalance) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.totalBuys) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.yearProfit) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.totalAmount) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.inflationCorrectedAmount) }} {{ (point.taxPaid + point.exitTaxPaid) > 0 ? formatCurrency(point.taxPaid + point.exitTaxPaid) : '—' }} ET {{ formatCurrency(point.afterTaxTotalAmount) }} {{ formatCurrency(point.afterTaxInflationCorrectedAmount) }}

Portfolio Allocation

{{ slice.ticker }} {{ slice.etfName }}
{{ formatCurrency(slice.value) }} {{ slice.percent.toFixed(1) }}%

Your Holdings

Ticker ETF Name Quantity Avg Cost Current Price Price Source Total Value Gain/Loss Actions
Daily Weekly Monthly YTD
